## Design Style
*Source: https://linear.app — generated by /taste*

### Tokens
- **Spacing unit**: 8px base
- **Spacing scale**: 8px, 12px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 64px, 72px, 224px, 274px
- **Colors**:
  - background: `#08090a` (main dark background)
  - text-primary: `#f7f8f8` (crisp white)
  - text-secondary: `#d0d6e0` (light cool gray)
  - text-muted: `#8a8f98` (medium gray)
  - text-dark-muted: `#62666d` (darker gray)
  - surface: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` (card surface)
  - surface-dark: `#18191a` (inset panels)
  - border: `#23252a` (borders and dividers)
  - accent-purple: `#5e6ad2` (CTA accents)
  - accent-blue: `#004eff` (secondary accents)
- **Typography (Inter Variable)**:
  - 72px Display Large (weight 510, line-height 72px)
  - 64px Hero Title (weight 510, line-height 64px)
  - 48px H1 Header (weight 510, line-height 48px)
  - 24px H3 Header (weight 590, line-height 31.92px)
  - 20px Body Large (weight 510, line-height 26.6px)
  - 16px H4 Header (weight 590, line-height 24px)
  - 15px Body Text (weight 400, line-height 24px)
  - 13px Caption (weight 510, line-height 19.5px)
- **Radii**: 2px (small details), 4px (buttons/badges), 6px (small cards), 8px (chat/input panels), 12px (major panels), 9999px (pills)
- **Shadows**:
  - Card Border Shadow: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) 0px 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 4px 4px 0px`
  - Drop Shadow: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) 0px 2px 4px 0px`
  - Border Shadow: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 0px 1px`
- **Image ratios**: 2.15:1 (hero), 1.79:1 (full hero), 1.78:1 (feature)

### Behavior
- When selecting background and interactive colors for the workspace tool, always choose an entirely near-black background (#08090a) and white/gray typography (#f7f8f8, #d0d6e0), restricting primary brand accents (#5e6ad2) strictly to key interactive surfaces — because high-contrast white text on a dark canvas already provides all the visual hierarchy needed.
- When defining bounds and visual weight for layout panels and card surfaces, always choose thin inset borders and multi-layered border outlines (1px border-color #23252a inset) instead of standard fuzzy outer drop shadows — because crisp inset lines preserve visual clarity on dark interfaces.
- When spacing out content modules along the vertical scroll layout, always choose massive, deliberate vertical gaps of 224px to 274px over standard 80px–100px block margins — because massive gaps create natural cognitive pauses that let the user digest each module.
- When setting typographic weights for display headers and large titles, always choose custom intermediate optical weights (510 weight for H1/H2 sizes, 590 weight for subheadings) instead of standard bold (700) or medium (500) — because standard weights look bloated and clog white space at large sizes.

### Do Not
- Avoid introducing bright brand colors on background panels or text headers. Keep backgrounds strictly dark (#08090a) and text grays/white.
- Never use heavy, fuzzy outer drop shadows to denote depth on dark interfaces; use crisp 1px borders or inset outlines instead.
- Avoid squeezing vertical section gaps into tight margins; maintain section gaps above 200px to allow the visual layout to breathe.
- Never default to standard bold (700) weights for display headings above 32px; use intermediate weights (510) to preserve readability.
